Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Harmonize - Wewe (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
In Swahili, “Wewe” means “You.” And in this record, “You” is not just a word it’s a choice, a declaration, and a promise.

“Wewe” is a deeply personal love confession from Harmonize to the woman who holds his heart. Built on S2Kizzy’s warm, emotional production, the song feels intimate like a private conversation turned into music. It’s not just a love song; it’s a man openly choosing his partner in front of the world.

With the line “wewe ndo unanipendeza, dunia inajua,” Harmonize makes his feelings public and unapologetic. He celebrates her beauty, her presence, and the peace she brings into his life. There’s maturity in his words “mimi mwenyewe najipongeza, najua kuchagua” as he appreciates finding someone genuine in a world often driven by money and appearances.

The song also reflects growth. He acknowledges past distractions and people who were only interested in wealth “kumbe walitaka pesa nikawapa moyo.” It’s a vulnerable admission of giving his heart to the wrong places, only to realize that real love was always with “wewe.” Through jealousy, outside pressure, and life’s ups and downs, he makes it clear that their bond keeps rising like the sun after every storm.

The repeated plea “ni bora ningekupa wewe tu upendo, muda wangu…” carries both regret and devotion. It’s the sound of a man who now understands the value of giving his time, loyalty, and full attention to one woman.

“Wewe” captures Harmonize at his most sincere  romantic, reflective, and emotionally open. It’s a royal dedication to true love, reminding listeners that genuine connection will always outweigh money, fame, or fleeting attention.

snippet.title: MEJJA & SCAR MKADINALI - KALE KA UOGA [Official Video]
snippet.description:
Mejja ft. Scar Mkadinali – Kale Ka Uoga (Official Video)

Mejja presents his 1st album: MTOTO WA KHADIJA. 
Known for his witty lyricism, street storytelling and unique Kenyan flavor, Mejja delivers a project that blends Genge, Hip Hop and Afro Urban sounds.
On this album, Mejja not only collaborates with established East African artists but also features new and uprising talents, giving a platform to the next generation of artists shaping the Kenyan music scene.
The album includes collaborations with Jay Melody, Nadia Mukami, Khaligraph Jones, Scar Mkadinali, Dyana Cods, Fik Fameica, Ndovu Kuu, Zzero Sufuri, Toxic Lyrikali, Shee, Moha and Madeh.
Listen, share and subscribe for more great music.

snippet.title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
snippet.description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

snippet.title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

snippet.title: NINAKUSHUKURU - Rev Ruth Wamuyu (OFFICIAL LIVE VIDEO)
snippet.description:
In the middle of practice for the Mambo Sawa Sawa Live Recording, a deep sense of gratitude welled up in our hearts, and this song “Ninakushukuru” was birthed. A simple, sincere cry to God just to say Thank You. If it had not been for His grace, we would not have come this far.

As the final release from Mambo Sawasawa Live Recording, this song is our closing altar — a seal of thanksgiving, surrender, and acknowledgment that it has been God all along.

“Give thanks to the Lord, for He is good; His love endures forever.” — Psalm 107:1
May this sound stir your heart into gratitude, and may your life continually echo with Thanksgiving 

Song: Ninakushukuru (I Thank You)
Artist: Ruth Wamuyu
Album: Mambo Sawa Sawa LIVE
Director: Sir Alex
Production: Zero 2 Hero

snippet.description:
The Dangers of Online Relationships: A Roblox Story

In this video, we dive into a chilling and cautionary tale involving a Roblox player who risked everything for a connection made within the game. What started as a typical experience in Bloxburg quickly turned into a life-threatening situation that serves as a massive wake-up call for the Roblox community.

We explore the emotional journey of a young gamer, the pressures of online friendships, and the extreme lengths some players go to when the line between the virtual world and reality becomes blurred. This story highlights the importance of internet safety, the risks of meeting strangers from online gaming platforms, and the impact these decisions have on families.

Disclaimer
This video is created strictly for educational and entertainment purposes. The names and specific details have been adapted to protect the privacy of those involved. This content is intended to raise awareness about online safety and the potential real-world consequences of digital interactions. Always prioritize your safety and never share personal information or meet with individuals you encounter online without proper supervision and verification.
